one_time_description: Deferred contribution of $18,807,528 received from ISC for construction of Klappan Independent Day School Replacement (ICMS 126470), total project contribution $22,703,338
economic_notes: Band is economically dependent on ISC (42% of revenue) and First Nations Health Authority (20% of revenue). BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP provides gaming revenue. Tahltan Nation Development LP involved in joint ventures for construction/support services. Iskut Band Development Corporation operates Kluachon Centre Store (cafe, retail, groceries, gas).
notes: Audit is qualified for three reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not assessed; (2) Iskut Band Development Corporation (wholly-owned GBE) not fully consolidated due to unavailable financial info; (3) 33.33% interests in Tahltan Nation Development LP/Corp and Tahltan Legacy Corp — unable to confirm shared control; 33% interest in Tahltan Heritage Trust — unable to confirm proper accounting method. Large deferred revenue of $21.6M relates to ISC school construction contribution. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,141,336 + CMHC $108,513 + First Nations Health Authority $2,830,837 + FNESC $370,292 + Province of BC $457,681 = $9,908,659. OSR = $14,215,660 - $9,908,659 = $4,306,001 (excludes GBE income of $6,312,305 which is recorded separately below the line). Annual debt service = long-term debt repayment $445,261 + capital lease repayment $86,322 = $531,583. Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023, not 2024.
